info.title: EDD Action Group

post.summary: Execute an EDD use case and return its rows + metadata.
post.description: Runs one EDD use case (summary/detail, optionally exportable or internal). Provide the params required by the chosen use case's endpoint.

useCase.description: The EDD use case to execute.

params.description: Extracted parameters. Which are required depends on the use case (see the operation description for the endpoint mapping).

userAba.description: Requesting user's ABA (summary / export-summary path segment).

aba.description: Target ABA for the report (path segment).

endpoint.description: Endpoint/channel segment for the EDD query.

reportId.description: Detail report id (detail / export-detail). NOT stored and NOT fixed: derive it from an eddSummaryReport result by selecting a record from result.reportDataList and joining its identifiers as `${eddLoadID}_${ncdwRecordID}` (e.g. 2233_3003696182).

sortOrder.description: Sort direction: asc or desc (summary query).

200.description: Dispatch result for the EDD use case.
